value.found_quote: The Agents SDK handles orchestration across Codex, hand-offs, and traces.
value.rationale: The page repeatedly describes hand-offs as a feature of the OpenAI Agents SDK, including orchestrating multi-agent workflows "with hand-offs, guardrails, and full traces" and code using the `handoffs` parameter. This substantiates that OpenAI offers hand-offs as part of its Agents SDK.
